summary: Add `toolchain go1.26.4` to go.mod to pick up patched net/textproto and crypto/x509 stdlib.
reason: go1.26.3 stdlib has reachable CVEs GO-2026-5039 and GO-2026-5037 (fixed in go1.26.4); without the directive govulncheck blocks publish and downstream installs build against the vulnerable stdlib.
